title: Savory Gooey Saudian Sweetcorn Stir-fry
description: This savory and gooey dish features sweetcorn blanched and added to a Paleo-friendly stir-fry that serves as an excellent hangover-cure.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Blanch sweetcorn in boiling water for about 2 minutes.
In a large skillet, heat avocado oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped onions and garlic; sauté until fragrant and translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add green peppers and palm hearts (if using), stirring occasionally for another 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the blanched sweetcorn along with thyme leaves and salt/pepper to taste. Cook for an additional minute or two.
Serve immediately as a Paleo-friendly snack or hangover cure.
